steps.title: Write the ticket count
steps.content:
Let $f$ be standard tickets and $r$ be discounted tickets. The total number of tickets is $216$, so
$$f+r=216$$

steps.title: Write the revenue equation
steps.content:
Standard tickets cost $12$ each, and discounted tickets cost $8.50$ each. The total revenue is $2{,}256$, so
$$12f+8.50r=2{,}256$$

steps.title: Match the system
steps.content: The system with the ticket-count equation and the revenue equation is choice B. The answer is B.
